growth_cues.signal: Dual seniority coverage in DevOps/DevSecOps engineering suggests functional expansion
growth_cues.evidence: "Senior DevOps Engineer" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica AND "Sr. DevSecOps Engineer" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica: two distinct senior-level engineering roles open simultaneously in overlapping DevOps/security-engineering space, satisfying (a) DevSecOps is a newer hybrid role type and (b) multiple seniority-adjacent levels in the same function.

growth_cues.signal: Principal-level and architect-level engineering roles signal senior-layer buildout across security/software functions
growth_cues.evidence: "Principal Software Engineer" — https://builtin.com/job/ecommerce-tech-lead/8919913 AND "Security Architect" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica AND "Solutions Architect II" — https://builtin.com/job/solutions-architect-ii/8735183: three senior/principal/architect-grade technical roles across distinct functions (software, security, cloud solutions), satisfying (a) new role types in the CR roster and (c) architect-grade = near-director seniority in engineering hierarchy.

ambiguous_cues.signal: Single Product Support Engineer opening — could be backfill for attrition in a high-turnover support function
ambiguous_cues.evidence: "Product Support Engineer" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica: one isolated opening in an established support function with no additional seniority levels or management role posted alongside it.

ambiguous_cues.signal: Single Global Equity Specialist II opening in Finance — isolated mid-level role with no adjacent Finance postings
ambiguous_cues.evidence: "Global Equity Specialist II" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica: one mid-level finance/equity role with no junior or senior companion postings and no finance manager role, failing the 2-of-3 growth threshold.

ambiguous_cues.signal: Intern - Sales Enablement opening is isolated and low-seniority — unclear if it signals sales function growth or a routine intern rotation
ambiguous_cues.evidence: "Intern - Sales Enablement" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica: single intern-level sales posting with no accompanying full-time sales roles or sales management postings in this CR chunk.
ambiguous_cues.ambiguity_reason: intern postings routinely cycle regardless of headcount growth; insufficient evidence to confirm expansion

ambiguous_cues.signal: Site Reliability Engineer II is a single mid-level SRE opening — no senior SRE or SRE manager posted alongside
ambiguous_cues.evidence: "Site Reliability Engineer II" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica: one mid-level SRE role with no companion seniority levels or EM/manager posting, meeting only 1-of-3 growth criteria (role type present in engineering roster).

stability_cues.signal: CR site rating matches global rating at 4.3, indicating the Costa Rica office is not an underperforming outlier
stability_cues.evidence: CR culture intel: cr_reviews=69, rating=4.3, delta=parity — CR and global ratings are equal at 4.3, suggesting the local office maintains comparable employee sentiment to headquarters.

stability_cues.signal: Positive work-life balance signal from CR employee reviews
stability_cues.evidence: CR culture intel: wlb=positive — local reviewer sentiment on WLB is consistently favorable, supporting day-to-day environment stability for CR-based employees.

stability_cues.signal: Multi-department technical hiring spread across DevOps, SRE, Security, and Software Engineering suggests an established, multi-function engineering presence in CR
stability_cues.evidence: "Senior DevOps Engineer" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica; "Site Reliability Engineer II" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica; "Security Architect" — https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?keywords=Akamai&location=Costa%20Rica; "Principal Software Engineer" — https://builtin.com/job/ecommerce-tech-lead/8919913: four distinct engineering disciplines actively hiring from the CR site.

red_flags.signal: Confirmed layoffs within the last 12 months with employee-reported sense of recurring instability
red_flags.evidence: CR culture intel: layoffs=True, recency=recent_12mo. Direct quote: "Sense of instability from layoffs twice in ~12 months" — corroborated across multiple CR reviewer fragments.

red_flags.signal: Negative management signals: multiple leadership changes and closed-door culture reported by CR reviewers
red_flags.evidence: CR culture intel: management=mixed. Direct quotes: "CR salaries below market; multiple mgmt changes same year" and "Management was the worst; no open-door policy" — sourced from CR-specific review fragments.

red_flags.signal: Compensation flagged as below local market by CR employees, with comp sub-rating trailing even the modest global benchmark
red_flags.evidence: CR culture intel: comp=mixed, comp sub-rating for CR (4.0–4.1) trails global (4.0–4.2). Direct quote: "CR salaries below market" — indicates a localized comp disadvantage relevant to Costa Rica candidates evaluating offers.

inside_scoop.red_flags_note: Layoff recency (confirmed within 12 months, reportedly occurring twice) is the dominant risk signal. Combined with mixed management ratings and below-market comp feedback from CR reviewers, candidates should pressure-test role stability and compensation benchmarks before accepting an offer.
inside_scoop.org_focus_justification: 6 of 9 active postings are in engineering or technical architecture functions (Senior DevOps Engineer, Sr. DevSecOps Engineer, Site Reliability Engineer II, Security Architect, Solutions Architect II, Principal Software Engineer), with the remaining 3 spread across Support, Sales, and Finance.
